content.query:
/*

CREATE VIEW AMZ.RTSales AS
SELECT *
FROM
    OPENROWSET(
        BULK 'https://tlclake.dfs.core.windows.net/tlclakefs/parquet/sp_vendor_rt_sales_v1/*.parquet',
        FORMAT = 'PARQUET'
    ) AS [result]

CREATE VIEW AMZ.RTInventory AS
SELECT *
FROM
    OPENROWSET(
        BULK 'https://tlclake.dfs.core.windows.net/tlclakefs/parquet/sp_vendor_rt_inventory_v1/*.parquet',
        FORMAT = 'PARQUET'
    ) AS [result]

CREATE VIEW AMZ.Forecast AS
SELECT * FROM
    OPENROWSET(
        BULK 'https://tlclake.dfs.core.windows.net/tlclakefs/parquet/sp_vendor_forecasting_v2/*.parquet',
        FORMAT = 'PARQUET'
    ) AS [result]
WHERE ob_modified_date = (SELECT MAX(ob_modified_date) FROM
    OPENROWSET(
        BULK 'https://tlclake.dfs.core.windows.net/tlclakefs/parquet/sp_vendor_forecasting_v2/*.parquet',
        FORMAT = 'PARQUET'
    ) AS [result])

*/
